name: @my-platform/campus-service
description: Self-hosted read-only campus information workspace for HGU.

scripts.check: node --check server.js && node --check public/app.js && node --check public/admin.js && node --check public/platform-runtime.js && node --check scripts/users.mjs && node --check scripts/backup.mjs && node --check scripts/generate-secrets.mjs && node --check scripts/setup-env.mjs && node --check src/lib/env.js && node --check src/lib/http.js && node --check src/lib/password.js && node --check src/lib/platform-sso.js && node --check src/lib/static-assets.js
scripts.lint: eslint server.js public/app.js public/admin.js scripts src test
scripts.verify: npm run check && npm run lint && npm test
